_instructions: HOW TO SET UP: 1) Create a Discord bot at https://discord.com/developers/applications  2) Enable MESSAGE_CONTENT intent under Bot settings  3) Invite bot to target servers with 'Read Message History' permission  4) Paste your bot token above  5) Add server/channel IDs (right-click > Copy ID with Developer Mode on)  6) Set 'enabled' to true for each server you want to scrape
